final_response:
Amsterdam is widely recognized as the capital and largest city of the Netherlands, a fact reflected in various languages such as Kurdish, Finnish, Low German, and Turkish. It is officially classified both as the capital of the Netherlands and as one of its municipalities. Amsterdam is located in the country of the Netherlands, with its central district known as Amsterdam-Centrum.

The city’s motto is "Heldhaftig, Vastberaden, Barmhartig," which translates to "Valiant, Steadfast, Compassionate" in English. Residents of Amsterdam are referred to as Amsterdammers. The city is governed by the Municipal Council of the Netherlands.

Amsterdam has a total population of 933,680, while its urban area is home to 1,477,213 people. The city covers a total area of 219.32 square kilometers, with 165,760,000 square meters of land and 53,560,000 square meters of water. Amsterdam is situated at an elevation of -2.0 meters below sea level. The area code for Amsterdam is 020, and its postal codes range from 1000 to 1183.

The city observes Central European Time (CET) with a UTC offset of +1, and during daylight saving time, it follows Central European Summer Time (CEST) with a UTC offset of +2.

Amsterdam is widely recognized as the capital and largest city of the Netherlands, a fact reflected in various languages such as Kurdish, Finnish, Low German, and Turkish. It is officially classified both as the capital of the Netherlands and as one of its municipalities. Amsterdam is located in the country of the Netherlands, with its central district known as Amsterdam-Centrum.

The city’s motto is "Heldhaftig, Vastberaden, Barmhartig," which translates to "Valiant, Steadfast, Compassionate" in English. Residents of Amsterdam are referred to as Amsterdammers. The city is governed by the Municipal Council of the Netherlands.

Amsterdam has a total population of 933,680, while its urban area is home to 1,477,213 people. The city covers a total area of 219.32 square kilometers, with 165,760,000 square meters of land and 53,560,000 square meters of water. Amsterdam is situated at an elevation of -2.0 meters below sea level. The area code for Amsterdam is 020, and its postal codes range from 1000 to 1183.

The city observes Central European Time (CET) with a UTC offset of +1, and during daylight saving time, it follows Central European Summer Time (CEST) with a UTC offset of +2.
